title: Exploring Nigeria’s Digital Economy Future - FinancialEDGE
description: The Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) held its 35th Annual Conference in Lagos, bringing together industry experts, regulators, and financial institutions to discuss the theme "Bracing for the Digital Economy in Nigeria: Taxation, Banking and Finance". Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge and Joyce Onyegbule, Head of Corporate Communications at Nigeria Sovereign Investment
html:
The Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) held its 35th Annual Conference in Lagos, bringing together industry experts, regulators, and financial institutions to discuss the theme “Bracing for the Digital Economy in Nigeria: Taxation, Banking and Finance”.

Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge and Joyce Onyegbule, Head of Corporate Communications at Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority (NSIA), were in attendance.

The conference serve as an agenda-setting forum for stakeholders in the economy, focusing on emerging issues in digital finance.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial  / Project Director Financial Edge and Head, Corporate Communications Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority(NSIA) Ms Joyce Onyegbule at the 2025 annual conference of FICAN in Lagos.
